content.text:
Here are several reputable clinics in **Katy, Texas** offering **PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) therapy for hair loss**:

• **Vitality Health & Wellness**  
  A health and wellness center offering non-surgical hair restoration via PRP, along with microneedling and other aesthetic treatments. Located at 633 E Fernhurst Dr Suite 804. ([vitalityhealthandwellness.info](https://vitalityhealthandwellness.info/?utm_source=openai))

• **Luminous MediSpa**  
  Offers PRP hair restoration to stimulate natural regrowth and improve hair density. Located at 410 W Grand Pkwy S Suite 310. ([luminousmedispa.com](https://luminousmedispa.com/prp-hair-restoration/?utm_source=openai))

• **Gameday Men’s Health (Katy)**  
  Specializes in PRP therapy for men, focusing on hair regrowth with 3–4 sessions recommended initially and maintenance every 6–12 months. Located at 26717 Westheimer Pkwy Suite 804. ([gamedaymenshealth.com](https://gamedaymenshealth.com/katy/prp-for-hair-loss/?utm_source=openai))

• **Ageless Med Spa**  
  Provides noninvasive PRP hair restoration therapies. Located at 414 W Grand Pkwy S #115. ([agelessmedspakaty.com](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/hair-restoration/?utm_source=openai))

• **Luxe Medical Aesthetics**  
  Offers PRP for hair restoration in addition to skin rejuvenation treatments, harnessing the body's platelets to stimulate thicker hair growth. ([theluxeeffect.com](https://theluxeeffect.com/our-services/prp/?utm_source=openai))

• **Aesthetic Master Infusions**  
  Provides PRP treatments for hair thinning and loss, along with facial rejuvenation and joint pain. Known for personalized care and flexible financing. ([aestheticmasterinfusions.com](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/prp?utm_source=openai))

• **FUE Hair Clinic of Texas**  
  Offers PRP under its "Stem Cells (includes PRP)" and "Scalp PRP (Smart Harvest)" options. Located at 25145 Star Ln, Unit 605, Katy. ([fuehairclinicoftexas.com](https://www.fuehairclinicoftexas.com/prices?utm_source=openai))

• **Arhez Wellness**  
  Run by Dr. Makkani, offering customized PRP therapy for hair loss at 23960 Katy Fwy, Suite 320. ([arhezwellness.com](https://arhezwellness.com/hair-loss/?utm_source=openai))

• **Texas RICH – Regenerative Therapy & PRP**  
  Offers PRP injections as part of integrated regenerative care, along with exosome therapies for scalp health. Located at 9727 Spring Green Blvd Suite 150. ([healthhives.com](https://healthhives.com/clinic/texas-rich?utm_source=openai))

• **Radwan Medical Clinic & Rejuvenation Laser Center**  
  Offers PRP treatments intended to restore and treat hair loss. Located at 411 Park Grove Dr #610. ([radwancosmeticcenter.com](https://radwancosmeticcenter.com/platelet-rich-plasma-prp/?utm_source=openai))

• **Ara Med Spa (Richmond, near Katy)**  
  Provides advanced hair treatments combining PRP and exosomes for scalp rejuvenation and enhanced hair growth. Located at 7103 Katy‑Gaston Road, Suite 100, Richmond, TX. ([thearamedspa.com](https://www.thearamedspa.com/hair-treatments?utm_source=openai))

• **Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness**  
  Offers PRF (Platelet‑Rich Fibrin) treatments—an advanced form of PRP—for hair restoration, using EZ PRF technology. Located at 26622 Cook Field Rd Suite 300. ([hibiscus.health](https://www.hibiscus.health/facial-treatments/prf/?utm_source=openai))

---

**How to Choose the Right Option:**

1. **Treatment Type & Focus**  
   - If you're male and prefer a clinic tailored specifically for men, **Gameday Men’s Health** may be a good fit.  
   - For regenerative or integrative care that includes structural bodywork, **Texas RICH** offers combined therapies.  
   - For advanced regenerative options, **Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness** provides PRF—a next-gen variation of PRP.

2. **Clinic Expertise & Customization**  
   - Clinics like **Arhez Wellness**, **Aesthetic Master Infusions**, and **Luminous MediSpa** highlight personalized plans and expert-led care, which may benefit those seeking tailored treatment.

3. **Convenience & Location**  
   - Multiple clinics are concentrated around **West Grand Parkway** (e.g., Luminous, Ageless), making them easy to reach if you’re near that corridor.  
   - **Ara Med Spa** in nearby Richmond remains accessible and offers advanced combined treatments.

4. **Financing & Comfort**  
   - **Aesthetic Master Infusions** offers 0% financing and private appointments, which can enhance comfort and affordability. ([aestheticmasterinfusions.com](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/prp?utm_source=openai))  
   - **FUE Hair Clinic of Texas** offers complimentary consultations and in-house payment plans. ([fuehairclinicoftexas.com](https://www.fuehairclinicoftexas.com/prices?utm_source=openai))

---

**Next Steps:**

- **Schedule consultations** with one or two clinics that match your priorities for treatment type, approach, and accessibility.
- Inquire about:
  - The number of sessions required.
  - Expected timeline for visible results.
  - Aftercare procedures and any associated costs.
- **Check for patient reviews** or testimonials to understand others' experiences.

Let me know if you'd like help drafting questions to ask during your consultation or comparing the different treatment protocols!
